title: Above & Beyond Acoustic - Giving Up The Day Job
original_title: Above & Beyond: Giving Up the Day Job
overview: In 2016, GRAMMY-nominated trio Above & Beyond left the electronic world behind, risking it all to go acoustic. Their new film Above & Beyond Acoustic - Giving Up The Day Job, follows the group's unlikely journey from the DJ booth to the Hollywood Bowl.
